    Index

    C

    collectingNumFromGuessor() - Method in class Umpire
    Collects the number guessed by the Guessor.
    collectingNumFromPlayers() - Method in class Umpire
    Collects predicted numbers from all players.
    comparing() - Method in class Umpire
    Compares the number guessed by the Guessor with the predictions made by each player and declares the result.

    G

    gnum - Variable in class Guessor
     
    guessingNum() - Method in class Guessor
    Prompts the guessor to enter a number.
    Guessor - Class in Unnamed Package
    Represents the Guessor in the game.
    Guessor() - Constructor for class Guessor
     
    GuessorGameApp - Class in Unnamed Package
    Entry point of the Guessor Game application.
    GuessorGameApp() - Constructor for class GuessorGameApp
     

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class GuessorGameApp
     

    N

    numFromGuessor - Variable in class Umpire

    numFromPlayer4 - Variable in class Umpire
     
    numFromPlayer5 - Variable in class Umpire
     

    P

    Player - Class in Unnamed Package
    Represents a player participating in the guessing game.
    Player() - Constructor for class Player
     
    pnum - Variable in class Player
     
    predictNumByPlayer1() - Method in class Player
    Collects prediction from Player 1.
    predictNumByPlayer2() - Method in class Player
    Collects prediction from Player 2.
    predictNumByPlayer3() - Method in class Player
    Collects prediction from Player 3.
    predictNumByPlayer4() - Method in class Player
    Collects prediction from Player 4.
    predictNumByPlayer5() - Method in class Player
    Collects prediction from Player 5.

    U

    Umpire - Class in Unnamed Package
    Represents the Umpire who manages the game process.
